        public Result<StdSharedPtr<EdgesCollection>> constructEdgesCollection​(GraphInfo graphInfo,

                                                                      @com.alibaba.fastffi.FFITypeAlias("GraphArchive::IdType") long vertexChunkBegin,
                                                                      @com.alibaba.fastffi.FFITypeAlias("GraphArchive::IdType") long vertexChunkEnd)
        Description copied from interface: GrapharStaticFunctions
        Construct the collection for a range of edges.
        Specified by:
        constructEdgesCollection in interface GrapharStaticFunctions
        Parameters:
        graphInfo - The GraphInfo for the graph.
        srcLabel - The source vertex label.
        edgeLabel - The edge label.
        dstLabel - The destination vertex label.
        adjListType - The adjList type.
        vertexChunkBegin - The index of the beginning vertex chunk.
        vertexChunkEnd - The index of the end vertex chunk (not included).
        Returns:
        The constructed collection or error.
